oids.name: zxAnVlanGlobalCtagTpid
oids.description:
This object indicates global inner VLAN TPID, it only can be 
             configured with value '0x8100'.
             For C600 series, this object indicates up to four global inner
             VLAN TPIDs, separated by commas, e.g., '0x8100', '0x8100,0x9100'.

oids.name: zxAnVlanGlobalTpid
oids.description:
This object indicates up to four global outer VLAN TPIDs, 
             separated by commas, e.g., '0x8100', '0x8100,0x9100'.
             The default value is '0x8100,0x88a8' for C600 series.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTable
oids.description:
A table containing VLAN information for VLANs
            configured into the bridge by (local or network)
            management,  specifying the set of
            ports to which frames received on a VLAN for this FDB
            and containing a specific Group destination address are
            allowed to be forwarded.

oids.name: zxAnVlanEntry
oids.description:
Filtering information configured into the bridge by
            management, specifying the set of
            ports to which frames received on a VLAN and containing
            a specific Group destination address, are allowed to be
            forwarded. It is forbidden to destroy zxAnVlanEntry 
            whose zxAnVid exists in zxAnVlanVoipConfTable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanName
zxAnVlanDesc
oids.description: The description of VLAN.

oids.name: zxAnVlanRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.
            The state of this conceptual row only support 
            'not exist' and  'active'.
            The action of this conceptual row only support
            'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.
            
            To create a row in this table, a manager must
            set this object to createAndGo(4).
    
            To delete a row in this table, a manager must
            set this object to destroy(6). 
             
            To query this object, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfTable
oids.description:
A table containing VLAN Port information for VLANs
            configured into the bridge by (local or network)
            management,  specifying the set of
            ports to which frames received on a VLAN for this FDB
            and containing a specific Group destination address are
            allowed to be forwarded.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfEntry
oids.description:
Filtering information configured into the bridge by
            management, specifying the set of
            ports to which frames received on a VLAN and containing
            a specific Group destination address, are allowed to be
            forwarded.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfMode
oids.description: The access mode of the port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfTlsEnable
oids.description:
The Transparent LAN Service enable or disable.
             When port in access mode, TLS always disable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfTlsSVid
oids.description:
The TLS vlan id of the port.
            Only TLS enable, TLS Vlan id can be configured.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfDefaultVid
oids.description:
The default VLAN of the port.
             '0' indicates not configured.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfDefaultCVid
oids.description: The default CVLAN of the port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfTpid
oids.description: The outer VLAN TPID of this port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfIngressFilterEnable
oids.description:
When this is enable(1) the port will reject incoming frames for 
            VLAN only if the port belongs to that vlan. When this is 
            disable(2), the port will accept all incoming frames,regardless 
            of the the port's vlan membership.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfAcceptableFrameTypes
oids.description:
When this is admitOnlyVlanTagged(2) the device will
            discard untagged frames or Priority-Tagged frames
            received on this port.  When admitAll(1), untagged
            frames or Priority-Tagged frames received on this port
            will be accepted and assigned to the DefaultVid for this port.
            
            When admitOnlyVlanUntagged(3), only untagged frames
            or Priority-Tagged frames received on this port will be
            accepted for this port.
            
            When admitOnlyVlanSingleTagged(4), only single tagged frames
            received on this port will be accepted for this port.
            
            When admitOnlyVlanMaxDoubleTagged(5), the device will
            accept untagged frames or Priority-tagged frames or single tagged
            frames or double tagged frames received on this port.
            
            When admitOnlyVlanMaxSingleTagged(6), the device will
            accept untagged frames or Priority-tagged frames or single tagged
            frames received on this port.
            
            When admitOnlyVlanDoubleTagged(7), only double tagged frames
            received on this port will be accepted for this port.
        
            This control does not affect VLAN independent BPDU
            frames, such as GVRP and STP.  It does affect VLAN
            dependent BPDU frames, such as GMRP.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfTpidEnable
oids.description:
Enable or disable zxAnVlanIfConfTpid.
             
             enabled(1)  -- Apply the out VLAN TPID with zxAnVlanIfConfTpid.
             disabled(2) -- Apply the out VLAN TPID with zxAnVlanConfTpid in the 
                            zxAnVlanConfTpidTable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfVlanTable
oids.description:
VLAN configuration table.
             This table is only used for getting VLAN information (network-side 
             SVLAN of service port function) when operating on EPON/GPON ports.
             This table is used for setting and getting VLAN information when 
             operating on uplink ports.
             This table is used for setting and getting VLAN information when 
             operating on DSL ports.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfVlanEntry
oids.description: VLAN configuration entry.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfVlanTagVlanList
oids.description:
Tagged VLAN list in the port.
             A bit value of 1 indicates the associated VLAN is in the port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfConfVlanUntagVlanList
oids.description:
Untagged VLAN list in the port.
             A bit value of 1 indicates the associated VLAN is in the port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanExtPortListIITable
oids.description: Port list based on VLAN table.

oids.name: zxAnVlanExtPortListIIEntry
oids.description: Port list based on VLAN entry.

oids.name: zxAnVlanExtPortListIIRack
oids.description: Rack index for port list on the VLAN.

oids.name: zxAnVlanExtPortListIISlot
oids.description: Slot index for port list on the VLAN.

oids.name: zxAnVlanExtPortListIIPort
oids.description:
Port index for port list on the VLAN.
             Value 0 means non-PON port, other values means EPON/GPON port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanExtPortListIISegment
oids.description:
The segment of ONU that contains the port list.
             The segment will range from 1 to 16 when the port is EPON/GPON 
             port. 
             The segment will be always 1 when the port is non-PON port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransTable
oids.description:
VLAN translation extension table. 
             This table is an extension of the table zxAnVlanIfTransTable.
             This table includes VLAN translation information for single tagged 
             packets, and double tagged packets.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransEntry
oids.description: VLAN Translation extension entry.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransIngressVid
oids.description: Ingress VID for VLAN translation.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransIngressCVid
oids.description:
Ingress C-VID for VLAN translation.
             '0' means the packet to be translated is single tagged packet.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransVid
oids.description: VID after VLAN translation.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransCVid
oids.description:
C-VID after VLAN translation.
             '0' means the packet after VLAN translation is single tagged 
             packet.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransCos
oids.description:
VLAN CoS after VLAN translation.
             Value '0xFF' indicates not configured.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransCtagCos
oids.description:
CVLAN CoS after VLAN translation.
             Value '0xFF' indicates not configured.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfExtTransRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.
            
             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.

             To create a row in this table, a manager must set this object to 
             createAndGo(4), and must comply with the multi-variables binding 
             rule described in zxAnExampleFunc1Xxx1Entry.
    
             To delete a row in this table, a manager must set this object to 
             destroy(6). 
             
             To get this object, the agent always returns active(1).

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdTable
oids.description: This table includes VLAN based forward rule configuration.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnVlanBasedFwdTable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdSVid
oids.description: SVlan ,it shouled be included in the zxAnBasedFwdVlanTable

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdCVid
oids.description: cvlan

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdIfIndex
oids.description: An index for port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdSubIfIndex
oids.description: An index for port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdOtherIfIndex
oids.description: An index of the other port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdOtherSubIfIndex
oids.description: An index of the other port.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.
            The state of this conceptual row only support 
            'not exist' and  'active'.
            The action of this conceptual row only support
            'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.
            
            To create a row in this table, a manager must
            set this object to createAndGo(4), and must comply 
            with the multi-variables usage rules in zxAnVlanBasedFwdEntry
            description.
    
            To delete a row in this table, a manager must
            set this object to destroy(6). 
             
            To query this object, always return 1.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdConfTable
oids.description: This table includes VLAN based forward configuration information.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdConfEntry
oids.description: An entry in zxAnVlanBasedFwdConfTable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanBasedFwdConfMode
oids.description:
VLAN based forwarding mode.
             vlan1To1(1) - Forwarding the packets with the S-VID configured in
                           the zxAnVlanBasedFwdTable. When user-side interface
                           in the zxAnVlanBasedFwdTable is deleted, the packet
                           with the S-VID will be discarded.
             vlanAndMac(2) - Forwarding the packets with VLAN ID and MAC
                             address.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidConfTable
oids.description: A table containing VLAN TPID information.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidConfEntry
oids.description:
Entry for zxAnVlanTpidConfTable.
            
            The multi-variables binding rule should be complied with when a 
            manager creates a VLAN TPID. According to this rule, all the 
            related mib variables must be included in one SNMP set operation.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidConfTpid
oids.description:
This object indicates the outer VLAN TPID of this VLAN.
             Value define uses hex.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidConfRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.
            
             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.

             To create a row in this table, a manager must set this object to 
             createAndGo(4), and must comply with the multi-variables binding 
             rule described in zxAnVlanTpidConfEntry.
    
             To delete a row in this table, a manager must set this object to 
             destroy(6). 
             
             To get this object, the agent always returns 1.

oids.name: zxAnVlanForwardingCtrlTable
oids.description: A table containing VLAN forwarding control information.

oids.name: zxAnVlanForwardingCtrlEntry
oids.description: Entry for zxAnVlanForwardingCtrlTable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanMcastForwardingCtrl
oids.description: The multicast packet forwarding control.

oids.name: zxAnVlanProtocolFilterConfTable
oids.description: A table containing VLAN protocol filter information.

oids.name: zxAnVlanProtocolFilterConfEntry
oids.description: Entry for zxAnVlanProtocolFilterConfTable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanProtoFilterConfEthType
oids.description:
EtherType.
            pppoe(1) - EtherType is PPPoE.
            ipoe(2)  - EtherType is IPoE.

oids.name: zxAnVlanProtoFilterConfRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.

             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.

             To create a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
             createAndGo(4), and must comply with the multi-variables binding
             rule described in zxAnVlanProtocolFilterConfEntry.

             To delete a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
             destroy(6).

             To get this object, the agent always returns 1.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfTable
oids.description:
A table containing TPIDs to filter the packets.
             Packets will be discarded when the TPID is mismatched.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfEntry
oids.description:
A zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfTable entry.
             
             When the S-tag TPID filtering is configured in the
             zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterConfTable, the interface will filter the
             packets with zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterStagTpid.
             
             When the S-tag TPID filtering is not configured in the
             zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterConfTable, the interface will filter the
             packets with zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfStagTpid.
             
             When the S-tag TPID filtering is not configured in the
             zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterConfTable and zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfTable, it
             means the S-tag TPID filtering is disabled.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfIfType
oids.description: Interface type.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfStagTpid
oids.description:
Outer VLAN TPIDs.
             This object indicates up to four outer VLAN TPIDs of the interface, 
             separated by commas, e.g., '0x8100', '0x8100,0x9100'.

oids.name: zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.
 
             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.
 
             To create a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
             createAndGo(4), and must comply with the multi-variables binding
             rule described in zxAnVlanTpidFilterConfEntry.
 
             To delete a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
             destroy(6).
 
             To get this object, the agent always returns 1.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterConfTable
oids.description:
A table containing TPIDs of the interface to filter the packets.
             Packets will be discarded when the TPID is mismatched.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterConfEntry
oids.description: A zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterConfTable entry.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterStagTpid
oids.description:
Outer VLAN TPIDs.
             This object indicates up to four outer VLAN TPIDs of the interface,
             separated by commas, e.g., '0x8100', '0x8100,0x9100'.

oids.name: zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterRowStatus
oids.description:
The status of this conceptual row.

             The supported actions of this conceptual row only include:
             'createAndGo' and 'destroy'.

             To create a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
             createAndGo(4), and must comply with the multi-variables binding
             rule described in zxAnVlanIfTpidFilterConfEntry.

             To delete a row in this table, a manager must set this object to
             destroy(6).

             To get this object, the agent always returns 1.

oids.description: Entry for zxAnVlanCopyCosToOuterTable.

oids.name: zxAnVlanCopyCosToOuterDirection
oids.description: Direction.

oids.name: zxAnVlanCopyCosToOuterMode
oids.description: networkSide(1) - The rule is used in network side.

oids.name: zxAnVlanCopyCosToOuterRowStatus

The status of this conceptual row.
